description: Mexican criminal organization operating in Morelos and Guerrero states, founded in 2010 by Cleotilde Toribio Rentería (alias El Tilde) after the fragmentation of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel. Engaged in drug trafficking, homicide, kidnapping, extortion, and other crimes. Notorious for the 2014 disappearance of 43 students in Iguala. Currently active.

country_links.evidence_quote: su célula en Chicago, a donde dirigían la heroína que procesaban en los estados en mención, fue desmantelada por la DEA a finales de 2014
country_links.context: The organization traffics drugs to the United States, specifically heroin to Chicago.
